title: Boardwalk 101 — What It Is & Where Luly Fits
description: A short briefing for the Luly team on Boardwalk's product surface, then a mapping to concrete Luly offers we can pitch.

body.author: Luly Sales Prep
body.cardImageSvg:
<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 640 192">

  <line x1="0" y1="150" x2="640" y2="150" stroke="#0E7C7B" stroke-width="2"/>
  <g stroke="#0E7C7B" stroke-width="2" fill="none">
    <path d="M40 192 L80 150 L160 150 L200 192 Z"/>
    <line x1="70" y1="160" x2="170" y2="160"/>

  <text x="260" y="92" fill="#15191E" font-family="Montserrat, sans-serif" font-size="30" font-weight="700">Boardwalk 101</text>

</svg>

children.title: What Boardwalk Is, in One Minute

body.content: {"type":"doc","content":[{"type":"heading","attrs":{"level":1},"content":[{"type":"text","text":"Onchain Starts Here."}]},{"type":"paragraph","content":[{"type":"text","text":"Boardwalk","marks":[{"type":"bold"}]},{"type":"text","text":" (useboardwalk.com) is a permissionless "},{"type":"text","text":"launchpad protocol","marks":[{"type":"bold"}]},{"type":"text","text":" for new token economies. Anyone can spin up a launch; the rules — fees, vesting, liquidity treatment — are written into the token "},{"type":"text","text":"contract","marks":[{"type":"italic"}]},{"type":"text","text":" before a single dollar goes in."}]},{"type":"paragraph","content":[{"type":"text","text":"The platform serves four overlapping audiences:"}]},{"type":"bulletList","content":[{"type":"listItem","content":[{"type":"paragraph","content":[{"type":"text","text":"Issuers","marks":[{"type":"bold"}]},{"type":"text","text":" — teams or individuals launching a token / protocol"}]}]},{"type":"listItem","content":[{"type":"paragraph","content":[{"type":"text","text":"Traders","marks":[{"type":"bold"}]},{"type":"text","text":" — looking for venues where the rules can't change mid-trade"}]}]},{"type":"listItem","content":[{"type":"paragraph","content":[{"type":"text","text":"Contributors","marks":[{"type":"bold"}]},{"type":"text","text":" — early backers who want verifiable access terms"}]}]},{"type":"listItem","content":[{"type":"paragraph","content":[{"type":"text","text":"LPs & stakers","marks":[{"type":"bold"}]},{"type":"text","text":" — provide liquidity, stake the BMX governance token, earn fee flow"}]}]}]},{"type":"paragraph","content":[{"type":"text","text":"The boardwalk metaphor is everywhere on the site: a public, walkable seafront where everything is visible and you can choose your own stop."}]}]}
body.caption: Minimalist boardwalk and sun mark, flat vector illustration, using palette #0E7C7B primary, #F7F2E9 background, 1:1 aspect ratio

body.content: {"type":"doc","content":[{"type":"paragraph","content":[{"type":"text","text":"What makes Boardwalk structurally different from a generic launchpad is three guarantees baked into every launch:"}]},{"type":"orderedList","content":[{"type":"listItem","content":[{"type":"paragraph","content":[{"type":"text","text":"Locked liquidity at graduation.","marks":[{"type":"bold"}]},{"type":"text","text":" When a launch hits its raise threshold, the raised asset is paired with the supply and the resulting LP is "},{"type":"text","text":"permanently locked","marks":[{"type":"bold"}]},{"type":"text","text":". The rug-pull route is closed off at the contract level."}]}]},{"type":"listItem","content":[{"type":"paragraph","content":[{"type":"text","text":"Fees written into the token.","marks":[{"type":"bold"}]},{"type":"text","text":" Fee percentages and recipients are encoded in the token contract itself, so they apply across "},{"type":"text","text":"every","marks":[{"type":"italic"}]},{"type":"text","text":" trading venue — not just inside Boardwalk's own UI."}]}]},{"type":"listItem","content":[{"type":"paragraph","content":[{"type":"text","text":"Anti-sniper fee ramp.","marks":[{"type":"bold"}]},{"type":"text","text":" For the first ~90 minutes after a token goes live, fees start at ~40% and decay to the standard rate. Snipers get taxed; long-term holders don't."}]}]}]},{"type":"paragraph","content":[{"type":"text","text":"> Add to those: a "},{"type":"text","text":"7-day claim cliff","marks":[{"type":"bold"}]},{"type":"text","text":" after graduation, and a "},{"type":"text","text":"Café Boardwalk","marks":[{"type":"bold"}]},{"type":"text","text":" forum auto-created for every launch — so community discussion is part of the launch surface, not bolted on."}]}]}
body.caption: Padlock over a calm wave, flat line illustration, using palette #0E7C7B primary, #F7F2E9 background, 1:1 aspect ratio

body.question_md: {"type":"doc","content":[{"type":"paragraph","content":[{"type":"text","text":"Which of the following is "},{"type":"text","text":"not","marks":[{"type":"italic"}]},{"type":"text","text":" part of Boardwalk's structural guarantees?"}]}]}

choices.text: Liquidity is locked permanently at graduation
Fees are written into the token contract
An anti-sniper fee that ramps down over ~90 minutes
Boardwalk manually approves which projects can launch

body.content: {"type":"doc","content":[{"type":"paragraph","content":[{"type":"text","text":"Pick the option that is "},{"type":"text","text":"not","marks":[{"type":"bold"}]},{"type":"text","text":" a Boardwalk-by-design protection:"}]}]}

children.title: Two Launch Tracks: Express vs Advanced

body.content: {"type":"doc","content":[{"type":"paragraph","content":[{"type":"text","text":"A Boardwalk issuer picks one of two tracks at the start:"}]},{"type":"paragraph","content":[{"type":"text","text":"Express launch","marks":[{"type":"bold"}]},{"type":"text","text":" — for memes, experiments, fast tests."}]},{"type":"bulletList","content":[{"type":"listItem","content":[{"type":"paragraph","content":[{"type":"text","text":"24-hour auction window"}]}]},{"type":"listItem","content":[{"type":"paragraph","content":[{"type":"text","text":"Graduates at "},{"type":"text","text":"10 ETH","marks":[{"type":"bold"}]},{"type":"text","text":" raised"}]}]},{"type":"listItem","content":[{"type":"paragraph","content":[{"type":"text","text":"A "},{"type":"text","text":"single fee recipient","marks":[{"type":"bold"}]}]}]},{"type":"listItem","content":[{"type":"paragraph","content":[{"type":"text","text":"No supply vesting options"}]}]}]},{"type":"paragraph","content":[{"type":"text","text":"Advanced launch","marks":[{"type":"bold"}]},{"type":"text","text":" — for apps and serious protocols."}]},{"type":"bulletList","content":[{"type":"listItem","content":[{"type":"paragraph","content":[{"type":"text","text":"7-day auction window"}]}]},{"type":"listItem","content":[{"type":"paragraph","content":[{"type":"text","text":"Up to "},{"type":"text","text":"5 fee recipients","marks":[{"type":"bold"}]},{"type":"text","text":" (treasury, team, ecosystem, etc.)"}]}]},{"type":"listItem","content":[{"type":"paragraph","content":[{"type":"text","text":"Supply "},{"type":"text","text":"vesting schedules","marks":[{"type":"bold"}]},{"type":"text","text":" available"}]}]},{"type":"listItem","content":[{"type":"paragraph","content":[{"type":"text","text":"Same locked-liquidity + on-contract-fee guarantees"}]}]}]},{"type":"paragraph","content":[{"type":"text","text":"The track choice is the single biggest knob an issuer turns — it sets the entire shape of the launch."}]}]}
body.caption: Two side-by-side panels — a lightning bolt and a gear — flat geometric illustration, using palette #0E7C7B primary, #E97451 accent, #F7F2E9 background, 1:1 aspect ratio

body.content: {"type":"doc","content":[{"type":"paragraph","content":[{"type":"text","text":"Every launch follows the same four beats — what changes is the dial settings:"}]},{"type":"orderedList","content":[{"type":"listItem","content":[{"type":"paragraph","content":[{"type":"text","text":"Auction","marks":[{"type":"bold"}]},{"type":"text","text":" — open subscription window (24h Express / 7d Advanced). Anyone can contribute."}]}]},{"type":"listItem","content":[{"type":"paragraph","content":[{"type":"text","text":"Graduation","marks":[{"type":"bold"}]},{"type":"text","text":" — if the threshold is hit, the contract pairs the raised asset with token supply and locks the LP forever."}]}]},{"type":"listItem","content":[{"type":"paragraph","content":[{"type":"text","text":"7-day cliff","marks":[{"type":"bold"}]},{"type":"text","text":" — token claims are time-locked, plus the anti-sniper fee is in force on early trades."}]}]},{"type":"listItem","content":[{"type":"paragraph","content":[{"type":"text","text":"Live trading","marks":[{"type":"bold"}]},{"type":"text","text":" — the token is now tradeable everywhere; fees route per the on-contract config."}]}]}]},{"type":"paragraph","content":[{"type":"text","text":"If a launch "},{"type":"text","text":"doesn't","marks":[{"type":"italic"}]},{"type":"text","text":" graduate, contributors get their funds back. The contract decides — no human override."}]}]}
body.caption: Horizontal timeline arrow with four milestone dots, minimal flat illustration, using palette #0E7C7B primary, #E97451 accent, #F7F2E9 background, 1:1 aspect ratio

body.content: {"type":"doc","content":[{"type":"paragraph","content":[{"type":"text","text":"Two things tie the protocol together as a living system rather than a one-shot launchpad:"}]},{"type":"paragraph","content":[{"type":"text","text":"BMX staking + Designated Fees.","marks":[{"type":"bold"}]},{"type":"text","text":" A slice of platform fees is routed weekly via "},{"type":"text","text":"winner-takes-all","marks":[{"type":"bold"}]},{"type":"text","text":" governance vote. BMX stakers direct that bucket toward: buy-and-burn, more liquidity, treasury, or staker distributions. The token is "},{"type":"text","text":"non-inflationary","marks":[{"type":"bold"}]},{"type":"text","text":" — no emissions, just fee flow."}]},{"type":"paragraph","content":[{"type":"text","text":"Café Boardwalk.","marks":[{"type":"bold"}]},{"type":"text","text":" Every launch gets a forum auto-spun-up at graduation, with a 30-day-rolling "},{"type":"text","text":"upvote / downvote","marks":[{"type":"bold"}]},{"type":"text","text":" system. It's the launch's public lobby: discussion, complaints, hype — all attached to the token profile."}]},{"type":"paragraph","content":[{"type":"text","text":"Read together: the "},{"type":"text","text":"token profile page","marks":[{"type":"bold"}]},{"type":"text","text":" is the canonical surface — fees, vesting, audit history, forum, all in one place."}]}]}
body.caption: Ballot box with a circular B-token above it, flat minimal illustration, using palette #0E7C7B primary, #E97451 accent, #F7F2E9 background, 1:1 aspect ratio

body.question_md: {"type":"doc","content":[{"type":"paragraph","content":[{"type":"text","text":"Which Boardwalk track is the right call?"}]}]}

choices.text: Express — 24h auction, single fee recipient, 10 ETH grad
Advanced — 7-day auction, up to 5 fee recipients, supply vesting

body.content: {"type":"doc","content":[{"type":"paragraph","content":[{"type":"text","text":"A team wants to drop a "},{"type":"text","text":"meme experiment","marks":[{"type":"bold"}]},{"type":"text","text":" tonight — small, fast, single treasury wallet collects all fees. Which track fits?"}]}]}

{"type":"doc","content":[{"type":"paragraph","content":[{"type":"text","text":"Boardwalk already publishes "},{"type":"text","text":"docs","marks":[{"type":"bold"}]},{"type":"text","text":" and a "},{"type":"text","text":"FAQ","marks":[{"type":"bold"}]},{"type":"text","text":", but neither is a "},{"type":"text","text":"learning surface","marks":[{"type":"italic"}]},{"type":"text","text":" — they're reference. That's a clean opening for Luly."}]},{"type":"paragraph","content":[{"type":"text","text":"The pitch:","marks":[{"type":"bold"}]},{"type":"text","text":" a Boardwalk Academy with short, narrative courses for the three core personas — issuer, trader, contributor — each ~5–10 screens, with quizzes and progress tracking."}]},{"type":"paragraph","content":[{"type":"text","text":"Anchor courses to propose:"}]},{"type":"bulletList","content":[{"type":"listItem","content":[{"type":"paragraph","content":[{"type":"text","text":"\"How to launch on Boardwalk\" (Express + Advanced walkthroughs)"}]}]},{"type":"listItem","content":[{"type":"paragraph","content":[{"type":"text","text":"\"Reading a Boardwalk token profile\" (fees, vesting, audit)"}]}]},{"type":"listItem","content":[{"type":"paragraph","content":[{"type":"text","text":"\"BMX staking & Designated Fees, in 8 screens\""}]}]}]},{"type":"paragraph","content":[{"type":"text","text":"The win for Boardwalk: lower support load, higher first-launch success rate, a public artifact that demos the platform's transparency story without making the user read a docs site."}]}]}
body.caption: Graduation cap with tassel, flat minimal illustration, using palette #0E7C7B primary, #E97451 accent, #F7F2E9 background, 1:1 aspect ratio

body.content: {"type":"doc","content":[{"type":"paragraph","content":[{"type":"text","text":"Two more product surfaces where Luly maps cleanly to Boardwalk's needs:"}]},{"type":"paragraph","content":[{"type":"text","text":"Hook #2 — Per-launch onboarding flow.","marks":[{"type":"bold"}]},{"type":"text","text":" First-time issuers are the weakest link in any launchpad's funnel. Luly can ship a short, story-mode onboarding (3–5 screens) that walks a brand-new issuer from \"I have an idea\" to \"I'm staring at my graduation screen.\" Embed it in the Boardwalk dashboard at first-login."}]},{"type":"paragraph","content":[{"type":"text","text":"Hook #3 — Pre-graduation campaigns & waitlists.","marks":[{"type":"bold"}]},{"type":"text","text":" High-profile launches need a marketing layer "},{"type":"text","text":"before","marks":[{"type":"italic"}]},{"type":"text","text":" the auction opens. Luly's "},{"type":"text","text":"waitlist","marks":[{"type":"code"}]},{"type":"text","text":" and "},{"type":"text","text":"campaign-simple","marks":[{"type":"code"}]},{"type":"text","text":" presets give Boardwalk-listed projects:"}]},{"type":"bulletList","content":[{"type":"listItem","content":[{"type":"paragraph","content":[{"type":"text","text":"Email capture for \"first 50 contributors get …\""}]}]},{"type":"listItem","content":[{"type":"paragraph","content":[{"type":"text","text":"A short \"what this launch is\" explainer landing"}]}]},{"type":"listItem","content":[{"type":"paragraph","content":[{"type":"text","text":"Anti-sniper context delivered to the right people before the clock starts"}]}]}]},{"type":"paragraph","content":[{"type":"text","text":"Both are "},{"type":"text","text":"off-protocol","marks":[{"type":"bold"}]},{"type":"text","text":" — they don't change Boardwalk's contracts, they sit alongside."}]}]}
body.caption: Megaphone with floating sparkles, flat minimal illustration, using palette #0E7C7B primary, #E97451 accent, #F7F2E9 background, 1:1 aspect ratio

children.title: Recap: Three Pitches to Open the Call

body.content: {"type":"doc","content":[{"type":"paragraph","content":[{"type":"text","text":"If we get a 30-minute slot with the Boardwalk team, open with these three — in order:"}]},{"type":"orderedList","content":[{"type":"listItem","content":[{"type":"paragraph","content":[{"type":"text","text":"Boardwalk Academy","marks":[{"type":"bold"}]},{"type":"text","text":" — a Luly-hosted learning hub. Lower support load, higher first-launch success, a public asset that doubles as marketing for the protocol's transparency story."}]}]},{"type":"listItem","content":[{"type":"paragraph","content":[{"type":"text","text":"First-launch onboarding flow","marks":[{"type":"bold"}]},{"type":"text","text":" — embedded in the Boardwalk dashboard. Targets the weakest part of every launchpad funnel: the brand-new issuer."}]}]},{"type":"listItem","content":[{"type":"paragraph","content":[{"type":"text","text":"Per-launch campaigns + waitlists","marks":[{"type":"bold"}]},{"type":"text","text":" — sold either as a feature Boardwalk offers its listed projects, or as a direct Luly product for those projects, with Boardwalk getting referral / co-marketing credit."}]}]}]},{"type":"paragraph","content":[{"type":"text","text":"> Closing line for the deck: "},{"type":"text","text":"\"Luly is the learning + marketing surface that turns Boardwalk's transparency into a story end users actually read.\"","marks":[{"type":"italic"}]}]}]}
body.caption: Three-item checklist with green ticks, flat minimal illustration, using palette #0E7C7B primary, #E97451 accent, #F7F2E9 background, 1:1 aspect ratio
